basic_details.job_title: PAU Junior Field/Lab Helper Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Punjab Agricultural University (PAU) Junior Field/Lab Helper Notification 2026 has been released on 14 May 2026 on the official website https://www.pau.edu. Has been announced through the PAU Junior Field/Lab Helper Recruitment 2026. Candidates aged 18 to 63 years who have completed Middle with Punjabi are eligible to apply for this Junior Field/Lab Helper vacancy. The offline application process for PAU Junior Field/Lab Helper Recruitment 2026 is open until 29-05-2026. Candidates can download the official notification PDF and submit their application offline through the direct links provided

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 63 years

qualification.details: Junior Field/Lab Helper: Middle with Punjabi. Preference will be given to candidates who have been working as DPLs in the respective field in PAU for 10 years.

salary_details.details: Junior Field/Lab Helper: Rs. 11726/- per month (additional Rs. 800/- p.m.)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for PAU Junior Field/Lab Helper Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://pau.edu/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 29-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the PAU Junior Field/Lab Helper recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for the submission of applications for the PAU Junior Field/Lab Helper recruitment is 29th May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for the Junior Field/Lab Helper post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required for the Junior Field/Lab Helper post is Middle with Punjabi. Preference will be given to candidates with relevant experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: The age limit for candidates applying for the Junior Field/Lab Helper post is between 18 to 63 years. No specific age relaxation details are provided in the summary.

faq.question: Q4. How much is the application fee for the PAU Junior Field/Lab Helper recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee for all categories is Rs. 100/-. This fee should be paid in the form of a demand draft in favour of Comptroller, PAU, Ludhiana.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Field/Lab Helper position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Junior Field/Lab Helper post will receive a salary of Rs. 11726/- per month, with an additional Rs. 800/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the PAU Junior Field/Lab Helper recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Junior Field/Lab Helper role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Field/Lab Helper role will be based on a selection committee. Further details can be found in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Punjab Agricultural University (PAU), which is https://pau.edu/. Links are provided in the Important Links section.

faq.question: Q9. What is the walk-in date mentioned in the notification?
faq.answer: The walk-in date mentioned in the notification for the Selection Committee is 11th June 2026. Candidates should be prepared for this date.
